data.title: Usha Vance Faces Cold Reception In Greenland As Locals Say 'No... Thank You,' After JD Vance Steps In
data.description: The United States' Second Lady, Usha Vance, faced an unexpected setback as local residents in Nuuk, Greenland's capital, declined to welcome her ahead of her planned visit.

data.title: Trump Organization Invests $1.5 Billion In Luxury Golf And Urban Project In Vietnam Amid Tariff Uncertainty
data.description: The Trump Organization is investing $1.5 billion in a high-end golf course and urban complex project in northern Vietnam, slated for completion in March 2027.

data.title: Waymo's Robotaxis Rack Up 600 Parking Tickets, $65,000 In Fines In Just San Francisco In 2024
data.description: Waymo's self-driving cars have received fines worth $65,065 in San Francisco for traffic violations in 2024.

data.title: Bitcoin Options Worth Over $12 Billion Set To Expire On Friday: Market Volatility Looming Large?
data.description: The cryptocurrency market could experience a major upheaval as investors brace for the expiry of over $12 billion worth of Bitcoin options on Friday, March 27.
